title: [ExportVerilog] Add a loweringOption to disallow expressions in declarations

features.name: wire declaration with inline expression assignment
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration with an inline expression assignment where a combinational expression is assigned at the time of declaration

features.name: separate wire declaration and assign statement
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration without initialization followed by a separate assign statement for combinational logic
features.snippet:
wire c;
assign c = a & b;
